G

gamePanel - Variable in class controller.GamePanelController
Instance of GamePanel used for the game interface.
gamePanel - Variable in class controller.LoadGameController
The singleton instance of GamePanel for displaying the loaded game.
gamePanel - Variable in class controller.NewGamePanelController
Instance of GamePanel for managing the game display.
gamePanel - Variable in class view.GameView
The game panel where the game is played.
GamePanelController - Class in controller
Controller class for the GamePanel, managing game actions and interactions.
GamePanelController() - Constructor for class controller.GamePanelController
Private constructor to initialize the GamePanelController and set up action listeners.
GameView - Class in view
GameView class represents the main window of the JBlackJack game.
GameView() - Constructor for class view.GameView
Constructs a GameView instance.

Gets the name of the avatar image.
getBet() - Method in class model.Player
Gets the amount of the player's current bet.
getCard(int) - Method in class model.BJCards
Gets the card at the specified index.

Deals a card to a player.
getCards() - Method in class model.Player
Gets the list of cards the player has.
getDealer() - Method in class model.ModelManager
Gets the dealer.
getDeck() - Method in class model.Player
Gets the deck of cards associated with the player.

Gets the enclosing BJCards instance.
getFilePath() - Static method in class controller.BaseController
Gets the file path.
getHand() - Method in class model.Player
Gets the value of the player's current hand.
getHp() - Method in class model.ModelManager
Gets the human player.
getHpCard() - Method in class model.ModelManager
Deals a card to the human player.

Gets the singleton instance of the AudioManager.

Returns the single instance of the ControllerManager.

Gets the blackjack value of the card.
getLevel() - Method in class model.Player
Gets the level of the player.
getLost() - Method in class model.Player
Gets the number of games lost by the player.
getMoney() - Method in class model.Player
Gets the amount of money the player has.

Gets the number of games played by the player.
